rulings.Case Title: GARRY EASLEY VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Percipient Witness Phillip Shaw And Production Of Documents At Deposition; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, March 3, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant T.W. Smith Co.¿s motion to compel the deposition of percipient witness Phillip Shaw and production of documents is continued to March 10, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 220 per agreement of the parties. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: HENRY GORING VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel Scott Company Of California To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition, And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, March 3, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiff Henry Goring¿s motion to compel Scott Co. of California to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition and request for monetary sanctions is denied. Defendant is awarded sanctions in the amount of $1000 (4 hours at $250 per hour). Plaintiff does not dispute the accuracy of paragraphs 5-9 of Mr. Dumont¿s declaration and thus plaintiff filed this motion prior to completing meet and confer efforts. = (220/HEK)
